name: write_device_image
full_help:
write_device_image

Description: 
Write programmable device image

Syntax: 
write_device_image  [-force] [-verbose] [-raw_partitions] [-mask_file]
                    [-logic_location_file] [-cell <arg>] [-no_pdi]
                    [-no_partial_pdifile] [-quiet] <file>

Usage: 
  Name                    Description
  -----------------------------------
  [-force]                Overwrite existing file
  [-verbose]              Print write_device_image options
  [-raw_partitions]       Write raw CFI and NPI partition files (.rcfi and 
                          .rnpi)
  [-mask_file]            Write mask file (.msk_cfi)
  [-logic_location_file]  Write logic location file (.ll)
  [-cell]                 Create only partial device image for named cell
  [-no_pdi]               Do not generate pdi file
  [-no_partial_pdifile]   Do not write partial pdi files for a Dynamic 
                          Function eXchange design
  [-quiet]                Ignore command errors
  <file>                  The name of the .pdi file to generate. If extension
                          is included, only allowed extension is .pdi

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Write raw CFI and NPI partition files (.rcfi and .rnpi)
Create only partial device image for named cell
Do not write partial pdi files for a Dynamic Function eXchange design
